exampleSentences.sentence: Washington D.C. is the capital of the USA.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: वाशिंगटन डी.सी. यूएसए की राजधानी है।

exampleSentences.sentence: Beijing is the capital city of China.
Moscow is a very cold city in winter.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: મોસ્કો શિયાળામાં ખૂબ ઠંડું શહેર છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: मास्को सर्दियों में एक बहुत ठंडा शहर है।

exampleSentences.sentence: New York is also called 'The Big Apple'.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: ન્યૂ યોર્કને 'ધ બિગ એપલ' પણ કહેવામાં આવે છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: न्यूयॉर्क को 'द बिग एप्पल' भी कहा जाता है।

exampleSentences.sentence: Singapore is known for its cleanliness.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: સિંગાપોર તેની સ્વચ્છતા માટે જાણીતું છે.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: सिंगापुर अपनी स्वच्छता के लिए जाना जाता है।
